sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51054" key="i)so/koilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσό-κοιλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n51054.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with equal cavities</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αὐλός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1021a</biblScope></bibl></cit>, Theo Sm.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.60</biblScope> </bibl> H.(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
